stemHtml: A pilot is performing spins for training. During the recovery of the spin, the pilot becomes concerned about the rapidly increasing airspeed and pulls back on the control column. During this pitch up manoeuvre, the airspeed is much higher than VA but not above VNE. Which of the following may happen?

options.c: Exceedance of the limit load factor which may cause permanent damage such as wrinkles, etc.
options.d: No limits are exceeded as the airspeed remains below VNE.
